analysis.mechanics: Jurisdictional mismatch between contribution (Region A) and residence (Region B) triggers the Spoliation Marker (fiscale spoliatie). Velocity penalty is amplified by 1.5x in the v62.0 DebtDigestor.
analysis.impact: Topological Atrophy of the Brussels Manifold substrate.

protocol_proposal.primary_invariant: Lex Domicilii (Tax follows territory of residence)
resilience_goals: Elimination of the Commuter Tax Leakage amplification
Stabilization of Brussels RoC at 0.18 floor
Hardening of the fiscal geodesic against 'Wolf' extractive maneuvers
